summary: Human and JSON recovery surfaces, bilingual help, fallback errors, and legacy discoverability are complete.
inspection_summary: Inspected real CLI output and reran ten UX-focused tests.
evidence: Recovery handles and safe copyable commands are present.
JSON and human errors share the stable typed contract.
English and Japanese help accurately state persistence-only run and single-snapshot watch.
judgment_delta: Former recovery and help ambiguities are resolved across human, JSON, legacy, and fallback paths.
